summary: Completed backend and frontend testing for Puzzle Master Blast multiplayer system overhaul. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified: Stats bar, Quick Match, Tabs, Room creation/joining, Game Room waiting state. Post-game rewards modal code reviewed and verified.

issues: useNativeDriver not supported (expected for Expo web)

seed_data_creation: Test users and rooms created with TEST_ prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multiplayer features tested and working. Socket.IO Quick Match uses polling/websocket transports. Post-game rewards: 100 coins/50 XP for winner, 25 coins/15 XP for loser.

multiplayer_screen.details: Stats bar shows: username (İsimsiz), 0 Galibiyet (Wins), %0 Oran (Win Rate), 100 coins. Quick Match button with 'Hızlı Eşleşme' and 'Anında rakip bul!' subtitle. Create Room button 'Yeni Oda Oluştur'. Tabs: Açık (Public), Şifreli (Private), Geçmiş (History).

quick_match_modal.details: Shows 'Rakip Aranıyor...' (Searching for opponent), timer (0:00), animated dots, 'İptal' (Cancel) button. Socket.IO connection established for matchmaking.

create_room_modal.details: Modal with 'Yeni Oda Oluştur' title, room name input (placeholder: 'Oda Adı'), 'Şifreli Oda' (Private Room) switch, 'İptal' and 'Oluştur' buttons.

room_list.details: Shows rooms with name, host (Kurucu), player count (e.g., 2/2, 1/2), and 'Katıl' (Join) button. Rooms correctly filtered by Public/Private tabs.

game_room_waiting.details: Title 'Oyun Odası', connection indicator (red/green dot), 'Oyuncu Bekleniyor...' text, VS layout with player cards showing avatar, name, and status (⏳ Bekliyor).

history_tab.details: Shows 'Henüz oyun geçmişi yok' (No game history yet) empty state with clock icon.

feature_verification.POST /api/profiles: VERIFIED - Creates/gets user profile with MongoDB persistence
feature_verification.PUT /api/profiles/{user_id}/sync: VERIFIED - Full profile sync with merge logic (server wins for stats)
feature_verification.POST /api/profiles/{user_id}/coins: VERIFIED - Adds coins to user, returns new balance
feature_verification.Socket.IO join_quick_match: VERIFIED - Modal shows searching state with timer
feature_verification.Multiplayer Stats Bar: VERIFIED - Shows username, wins, win rate, coins
feature_verification.Quick Match Button: VERIFIED - Gradient button with flash icon
feature_verification.Room Tabs: VERIFIED - Public, Private, History tabs with counts
feature_verification.Room Creation Flow: VERIFIED - Modal with name input and private switch
feature_verification.Room Joining Flow: VERIFIED - Join button navigates to game room
feature_verification.Game Room Waiting State: VERIFIED - VS layout with player cards
feature_verification.Post-game Rewards Modal: VERIFIED (code review) - Shows coins/XP earned, winner/loser styling

rewards_system.implementation: Server-side in finalize_game() and award_match_result() functions
